svg.title: Minecraft distributed compute architecture
svg.desc: Diagram showing player clients contributing resources to a coordinator which distributes tasks to a Minecraft server

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What resources can Minecraft players contribute to distributed computing?')
sendPrompt('What resources can Minecraft players contribute to distributed computing?')
sendPrompt('What resources can Minecraft players contribute to distributed computing?')
sendPrompt('How would a Minecraft mod coordinate distributed computing tasks?')
sendPrompt('What tasks in a Minecraft server could benefit from distributed computing?')
sendPrompt('How would a lightweight agent on a player machine send compute results back to a Minecraft server?')
sendPrompt('What are the main challenges and limitations of distributed computing with Minecraft players?')
